famous quote:
Only you and you alone can change your situation. Don't blame it on anything or anyone.
-Leonardo DiCaprio
Interview Text:
Jacob (name changed):

(part 5)

Many years prior to this, one of his family members often had a dream of an old, shriveled asian woman dressed in black. This family member was residing at a distinct old building during this time and many of the residents had also been having dreams of a shriveled asian lady dressed in black. She even saw the lady after she woke, standing in the window, glaring at her. 

One particular night during this season Jacob's daughter who was still living with him had come into his room scared because an old asian lady in black was screaming in the living room. He didn't believe this was happening and let her sleep in his room, far against the wall away from where the lady could not get her. He had seen the woman several times by the time his daughters encountered her. He had tried to tell himself it was just a dream. But then the next night his other daughter came in saying the same thing. As far as he knew, this daughter hadn't heard anything about it from him or his other daughter. He thinks they got this creature through his relative and the old building she had lived in. Perhaps it had migrated to his residence. 

While Jacob's daughter was living with them she had gone downhill: drugs stealing and other 'dark' episodes. Jacob later found journals about his daughter's dreams during that time which described the same shriveled old Asian lady.

On another night he had a dream inside a dream. He dreamed that shriveled asian lady had taken the blankets and was strangling him with them. He woke up in the dream to find himself in another dream. And when he woke himself up from that dream in real life he found the lady strangling him with the blankets. It felt like a thousand pounds. 

She had an ability to interact with the physical world and tried to intimidate Jacob regularly. Sometimes he would watch her actually turn the door-handle and come in. This went on for months. The only thing that deterred her was saying "In the name of Jesus get out." She would instantly disappear as soon as Jesus's named was used. 

Over time Jacob says he became stronger towards her and he let Jesus fight the battle more and more. It felt like a Biblical episode and Jacob learned to fight in Jesus's name.

The last time they encountered this creature was when his son Michael was a few years old. Jacob was taking the dog out. His daughter came running out to him saying Michael kept waking up and screaming that a woman in black was coming out of the walls. 

The only way he has found to get rid of them is to command them in the name of Jesus to get out. The night that she went after Michael everyone in the house prayed in every room. They never saw her again.
Music Video Instructions: When battling demons and struggling to find light, trust in the mysterious hand moving behind the scenes.
